category_sources: Official Solarus game page lists Genre as Action-RPG, Adventure.

tags_sources: Official GitLab project describes it as a parodic Zelda fangame made with Solarus.
Official Solarus page describes the game as a parodic game and lists Action-RPG, Adventure.
